Request For A Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar May-06-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for further Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants City Central Services, Inc., a foreign corporation, dba City Central Facility Solutions, Inc., Pristine Environments, Inc., a foreign corporation, PEI Operations, Inc., a dissolved foreign corporation, and PEI Facility Solutions, LLC, a foreign limited liability company.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Irene Tofft, CSR #12913. Email: itofft@sftc.org.

Cristina Pena Vazquez, Esq. appeared for plaintiffs California Labor Commissioner, Division of Labor Standards Enforcement, Department of Industrial Relations, State of California, on behalf of the People of the State of California.
Zhao Wang, the complainant and witness for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Court Certified Cantonese speaking interpreter Irene Chen assisted Ms. Wang during today's proceedings.
Ray Wang, the son of Zhao Wang, was placed under oath, but did not testify.
Ms. Vazquez, Zhao Wang, Ray Wang and Ms. Chen all appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendants City Central Services, Inc., a foreign corporation, dba City Central Facility Solutions, Inc., Pristine Environments, Inc., a foreign corporation, PEI Operations, Inc., a dissolved foreign corporation, and PEI Facility Solutions, LLC, a foreign limited liability company.

Plaintiffs' Second Amended Complaint for Back Pay and Injunctive Relief for Unlawful Discharge was filed on July 17, 2020, and personally served on defendant PE Facility Solutions, LLC on September 4, 20220.
Substitute service on defendants Pristine Environments, Inc. and PEI Operations, Inc. occurred July 17, 2020.
Substitute service on defendant City Central Services, Inc. occurred on August 7, 2020.
Default as to defendant PE Facility Solutions, LLC was entered on September 4, 2020.
Default as to defendant City Central Services, Inc. was entered on October 8, 2020.
Default as to defendants Pristine Environments, Inc., and PEI Operations, Inc. was entered on December 4, 2020.
DOE defendants were dismissed on January 29, 2021.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiffs alifornia Labor Commissioner, Division of Labor Standards Enforcement, Department of Industrial Relations, State of California, on behalf of the People of the State of California, and against the defaulted defendants City Central Services, Inc., a foreign corporation, dba City Central Facility Solutions, Inc., Pristine Environments, Inc., a foreign corporation, PEI Operations, Inc., a dissolved foreign corporation, and PEI Facility Solutions, LLC, a foreign limited liability company as follows:

Back Pay Owed Complainant Zhao Wang - $55,889.50.
Civil Penalties pursuant to Labor Code Section 98.6 - $10,000.00.
Civil Penalties pursuant to Labor Code Section 1102.5 - $10,000,00.
Prejudgment Interest - $22,003.63.
Attorney Fees - $2,825.00.
Costs - $1,1244.42.

Total - $101,962.55.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.
